publicationStmt.p: Unpublished draft from Babken Chookaszian volume I extraction

div.head: Article 515
div.p:
516
ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ
Spantaძata 145 Spəntōdato 145 Stackelberg 120, 123, 128, 129 Step‘anos 165, 297, 300 Strab 118, 293 Strassburg 86, 305 Sukias 488 Switzerlaud 487 Syrie 293, 294 T‘etał 165 T‘orgomean 301 T‘orgomyan 304 T‘ornik 163 T‘oros 294, 298, 301, 304 T‘ovma 165 Tabriz 292, 301, 302 Takayšvili 292, 299 Tamerlan 294, Tarawnec‘woy 165 Taronaci 165 Tat‘ēosik 298 Tatosian 4 Taylor 487 Tbilissi 292 Téhéran 160, 161, 296 Ter-Łevondyan 294 T
